title: Luna the Little Cloud
description: Speaker-to-persona mapping for multi-voice TTS production

narrator.notes: Main narrative voice - warm, bedtime aunt

luna.notes: Luna's dialogue - small, uncertain, growing confident

flower.notes: The flower - soft whisper, tired but hopeful

bee.notes: The bee - warm, slightly buzzy, grateful

storm_clouds.notes: Storm clouds - rumbly but not scary, dismissive
